summary: Closed, unmerged PR that attempted to match src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c function grInishie1_801FA9B4 by copying a _StageData-shaped structure from grHeal, while also containing earlier unrelated-looking edits in gryorster.c and lbsnap.c. The author later commented that earlier commits had been pushed and closed the PR to submit just the stage data fix.

key_files.role: Primary claimed target; adds grI1 stage data-like symbols, wraps StageData with report-format storage, changes grInishie1_801FA9B4 callback lookup and OSReport arguments, and introduces a local HSD_JObj* before DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c +40/-5 in 5 hunks
human_pr_text: Matches grInishie1_801FA9B4 to 100% by copying the same structure for _StageData found in grHeal.
raw_diff: grinishie1.c additions grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4944, grInishie1_StageData, grI1_803E4950, grI1_803E49A8
raw_diff: grInishie1_801FA9B4 changed cb initialization to pointer arithmetic from grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c
raw_diff: OSReport changed from inline literals to grI1_803E4950.report_fmt_get_gobj and grI1_803E49A8

key_files.role: Earlier-commit codegen edit; rewrites grYorster_80202428 loop with manual increment, temporary integer load, pointer/integer casts, and explicit f32 temporary.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/gryorster.c +7/-3 in 1 hunk
raw_diff: grYorster_80202428 adds s32 temp, manual for-loop increment, *(s32*)&...x1C, u32 casts, and f32 newValue

key_files.role: Earlier-commit local lifetime/addressing edit; rewrites lbSnap_8001DF20 through descPtr and offset locals.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/lb/lbsnap.c +8/-4 in 1 hunk
raw_diff: lbSnap_8001DF20 introduces struct Unk803BACC8* descPtr and int offset before assignment and call

what_changed: Added grI1_803E48C8 as an s16 array and used it as the StageData collision/block pointer via cast to S16Vec3*.
Added grI1_803E4944 as the stage data path string '/GrI1.dat'.
Added typedef grInishie1_StageData containing StageData plus a 0x24-byte report_fmt_get_gobj buffer, then defined grI1_803E4950 with INISHIE1 metadata and the report format string.
Added grI1_803E49A8 as the source filename string 'grinishie1.c'.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 callback selection from &grI1_803E48F4[arg0] to a StageCallbacks* computed from ((char*) grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c) + arg0.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 OSReport call from inline format and filename literals to fields/symbols inside the new stage-data-shaped storage.
Changed grInishie1_801FBC4C to store gp->gv.inishie1.blocks[index].jobj2 in a local HSD_JObj* before DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP.
Changed grYorster_80202428 loop shape and comparison using manual increment, integer temporary, pointer/integer casts, and an explicit f32 newValue.
Changed lbSnap_8001DF20 to use descPtr and offset locals rather than direct lbSnap_803BACC8 field writes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow accidental multi-commit decomp PRs before review
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a matching PR accidentally includes earlier commits from other subsystems, close/resubmit or otherwise narrow the diff so the claimed match can be reviewed independently.
